repo_signals: L3 smoke for business.ecommerce: cart and checkout state machine, inventory reservation versus overselling, order lifecycle from pending to paid to shipped to delivered cancelled or refunded, idempotent payment, stock concurrency, refund and cancellation flows
fix a CUDA kernel bank conflict

retrieval_query: shopping cart checkout state machine inventory reservation oversell order lifecycle pending paid shipped refunded idempotent payment stock concurrency cancellation sku

validation_smoke.name: business.ecommerce L3 validation smoke
signals: reserved stock never exceeds available quantity
duplicate payment request charges exactly once
order transitions follow the allowed state graph
refund returns stock and reverses state atomically

diagnosis_smoke.name: business.ecommerce diagnosis smoke
signals: oversell from concurrent checkouts on the same SKU
double charge from a retried payment without idempotency key
order stuck between paid and fulfilled after a partial failure
reserved stock leaked by abandoned carts that never release
refund issued without restocking or state reversal
